julesThoughtProcess: Analyzing terminal intercept. Gendo-archetype detected on screen. Subtitles indicate corporate headhunting tactics. Assessing threat level... Subject appears to be a critical asset in the ongoing cyber-struggle. Synthesizing narrative block.
storyPanel: The monitor flickered, a stark silhouette against the sterile light of the terminal. 'They want you to stop work, and they want you to work for them.' The words hung in the air, a chilling reminder that in this city, talent is a target.
